name: Section: contact
visual: Form on one side (name/email/phone/service-select/message, mono uppercase labels, required *), office info cards (address, phone, hours) + map on the other. Booking is offered as the primary path, form as fallback.
placement: Late page (slot 16), before footer. 12-col split (7/5 form+info, or 5/7 info+form); tabbed calendar/form variant for booking-led firms.
states: Inline validation; success/error banners; field focus adopts accent border.
animation: Form fields fade-up staggered; focus transitions border/ring 150ms; submit → spinner → success; banner slides + fades, auto-dismiss; map nodes pulse.

designLanguage.soft: Rounded inputs, pill submit, soft card.
designLanguage.warm: Hairline inputs on paper, ink submit.
designLanguage.swiss: Sharp inputs, signal submit, office cards + stylized map.
